sub_condition_signals.sleep_apnea: Waking unrefreshed despite long sleep hours, with a partner reporting **loud snoring or breathing pauses** during the night.
sub_condition_signals.anxiety: **Racing thoughts, physical tension, and a sense of impending doom** persist even when nothing stressful is actually happening.
sub_condition_signals.depression: **Persistent low mood, loss of interest, and emotional numbness** arrived before the cognitive slowness, not after.
sub_condition_signals.poor_sleep: **Lying awake for hours, waking repeatedly, or watching the clock** — yet no one has reported snoring or stopping breathing.
sub_condition_signals.adhd: **Lifelong difficulty finishing tasks, losing things, and feeling mentally scattered** — present in childhood, not just recently.
sub_condition_signals.hypothyroidism: **Cold hands and feet, unexplained weight gain, dry skin, and hair thinning** — the whole body feels slowed down.
sub_condition_signals.iron_deficiency: **Breathlessness on mild exertion, a sore or smooth tongue, and an urge to chew ice** accompany the mental fatigue.
sub_condition_signals.long_covid: Clear cognitive and energy decline began **directly after a confirmed or suspected COVID-19 illness** and has never fully resolved.
sub_condition_signals.b12_deficiency: **Pins and needles in hands or feet, a sore tongue, or a subtle unsteadiness** accompany the mental fatigue.
sub_condition_signals.vitamin_d_deficiency: Fog and low energy are **worst in winter or after long periods indoors**, with diffuse bone aching and low mood.
sub_condition_signals.dehydration: Fog lifts noticeably within **30–60 minutes of drinking a large glass of water** after a dry morning.
sub_condition_signals.reactive_hypoglycemia: **Shakiness, sudden irritability, and mental blanking 1–3 hours after a carbohydrate-heavy meal** — eating something sugary temporarily relieves it.
sub_condition_signals.histamine: Fog, flushing, headache, or a runny nose flare specifically after **aged cheese, wine, or cured meat** — not after fresh food.
sub_condition_signals.sibo: **Extreme upper abdominal bloating that builds through the day**, often worse after fibrous or fermentable foods, with belching and unpredictable stools.
sub_condition_signals.chronic_stress: Fog is worst on **Sunday evenings or before high-stakes situations**, and eases noticeably during holidays or low-demand periods.
sub_condition_signals.me_cfs: **Any physical or mental effort — even a short walk or conversation — triggers a crash lasting hours or days** afterward.
sub_condition_signals.uars: Waking feeling completely unrefreshed despite quiet sleep, with **chronic morning headaches and a tendency to breathe through the mouth** at night.
sub_condition_signals.dysbiosis: Fog feels diffuse and is triggered by **many seemingly healthy foods** — fruits, vegetables, wholegrains — with no single clear culprit.
sub_condition_signals.fungal: Fog is worse after **sugar, bread, or alcohol**, and recurring **oral thrush or vaginal thrush** flares accompany the cognitive symptoms.
sub_condition_signals.insulin_resistance: Fog is heaviest **mid-morning or mid-afternoon**, correlates with a growing waistline, and improves after cutting refined carbohydrates for several days.
sub_condition_signals.ncgs: Fog, bloating, and fatigue reliably follow **eating wheat or rye**, clear within days of removal, but coeliac testing has come back negative.
sub_condition_signals.cortisol_dysreg: Energy and clarity follow an **inverted pattern — alertness spikes late at night while mornings feel crushingly difficult** to start.
sub_condition_signals.tmd: **Jaw pain or clicking, teeth grinding at night, and temple headaches** accompany the fog — often worse after stress.
sub_condition_signals.chronic_sinusitis: A **constant sense of pressure behind the eyes, postnasal drip, and muffled hearing** make the head feel perpetually congested.
sub_condition_signals.pots: Fog and lightheadedness surge **immediately upon standing** and ease after lying back down, often with a racing heart on rising.
sub_condition_signals.migraine: Fog arrives as a **premonition hours before a headache**, or lingers for a day or two after the headache has passed.
sub_condition_signals.mcas: Reactions are unpredictable across **skin, gut, lungs, and heart simultaneously** — flushing, hives, throat tightness, and fog — triggered by heat, stress, or unrelated foods.
sub_condition_signals.perimenopause: Fog, mood shifts, and **irregular periods or new sleep disruption** appeared together in the mid-to-late 40s with no other explanation.
sub_condition_signals.deviated_septum: One nostril is **chronically more blocked than the other**, forcing mouth breathing at night and leaving the head feeling heavy and unrested.
sub_condition_signals.cervical_instability: Fog worsens with **specific neck positions or after prolonged screen time**, sometimes accompanied by a sensation of head heaviness or neck instability.
sub_condition_signals.atlas_misalignment: Fog and head pressure are **triggered or worsened by turning the head**, often after a whiplash injury, fall, or dental procedure.
sub_condition_signals.poor_posture: Fog and neck tension build during **long hours at a desk** and ease temporarily after stretching or lying flat.
sub_condition_signals.low_blood_pressure: Fog and visual dimming occur **briefly when standing up quickly** from sitting or lying, sometimes with near-fainting.
sub_condition_signals.eds: Joints that **bend beyond normal range, skin that stretches unusually, or lifelong easy bruising** accompany the fatigue and cognitive symptoms.
sub_condition_signals.leaky_gut: Fog and fatigue flare diffusely after meals in general — across **many unrelated foods** — alongside skin rashes, joint aches, and no clear single trigger.
sub_condition_signals.coeliac: Fog, diarrhoea, and **abdominal bloating reliably follow eating wheat, barley, or rye**, and the pattern has been consistent since childhood or young adulthood.
sub_condition_signals.lyme: Fog began after **a tick bite, a bull's-eye rash, or a flu-like illness following time outdoors**, and joint pain and fatigue persist alongside it.
sub_condition_signals.ebv: Fog and bone-deep fatigue have never fully cleared since **a severe glandular fever or mono-like illness**, often years earlier.
sub_condition_signals.mold_cirs: Symptoms are **markedly worse in a specific building** — home, office, or school — and improve noticeably when away from it for several days.
sub_condition_signals.low_testosterone: Fog accompanies **reduced drive, flattened motivation, loss of morning erections, and reduced muscle mass** in men, often from the mid-30s onward.
sub_condition_signals.post_concussion: Fog, light sensitivity, and difficulty concentrating have persisted **since a head injury**, even one that seemed minor at the time.
sub_condition_signals.bvd: **Reading causes rapid eye fatigue, words appear to shift, and headaches develop behind the eyes** — standard glasses have not resolved it.
sub_condition_signals.medication: Fog appeared or worsened **precisely when a new medication was started or a dose was increased** and has been present since.
sub_condition_signals.alcohol: Fog is directly and reliably linked to **drinking the previous evening**, even small amounts, and clears within a day of abstaining.
sub_condition_signals.tos: Fog accompanies **arm numbness, shoulder aching, or hand tingling** that worsens with arms raised overhead or during prolonged desk work.
sub_condition_signals.hpylori: **Burning or gnawing upper stomach pain that eases briefly after eating**, combined with nausea and early fullness, preceded the cognitive symptoms.
sub_condition_signals.hyperammonemia: Fog is **worst after high-protein meals**, sometimes with a subtle ammonia-like body odour, fatigue, or mild nausea following meat-heavy eating.
sub_condition_signals.mthfr: Fog persists despite normal B12 levels and is accompanied by **poor tolerance of alcohol, a history of miscarriage, or strong family history of clotting or cardiovascular disease**.
sub_condition_signals.heavy_metals: Fog developed gradually alongside **years of occupational exposure to metals, old amalgam fillings, or frequent consumption of large predatory fish**.
sub_condition_signals.pssd: Fog and **emotional blunting, sexual numbness, or genital anaesthesia** persist months or years after stopping an antidepressant, not during it.
sub_condition_signals.mitochondrial: Profound **exercise intolerance disproportionate to fitness level**, muscle weakness after minimal activity, and fog that deepens with any physical demand.
